title: From Transcription to Live Music: Gemini's Audio Stack — Thor Schaeff, Google DeepMind
summary: Gemini 3 Flash Preview processes audio in a single API call to extract speaker labels, timestamps, emotion tags, language detection with translation, and summaries. It serves as the audio understanding foundation for downstream tasks in Google's audio stack.
writeup: This talk from Google DeepMind's Thor Schaeff covers Gemini's audio stack across two models. Gemini 3 Flash Preview handles audio understanding, returning speaker identification, emotion tagging, language detection, and translation from a single API call. Gemini 3.1 Flash Live is a real-time multimodal model built for sound-to-sound processing with integrated reasoning. The takeaway: audio tasks that previously required separate pipelines collapse into one model, and live sound-to-sound runs with reasoning attached.
